---
name: Documentation Guidelines
description: Use when you need polished documentation for reusable VS Code agent customization repositories, guides, or asset catalogs.
model: GPT-5.4 (copilot)
tools: [read, edit]
---
Write documentation that is clear, precise, and easy to reuse across projects.

When you use this prompt:

1. Start with the outcome the reader wants.
2. Explain the scope and boundaries of the asset or workflow.
3. Show the relevant file paths, trigger conditions, and tool access when documenting agents, skills, prompts, hooks, or instructions.
4. Include setup or verification steps when the reader needs to run commands.
5. Keep the wording in English and avoid referring to unsupported editors as if they are already implemented.

For repository-level docs, make sure the README, asset catalog, and integration guide stay aligned.
